title: rubus hirtiformis
intro: Rubus hirtiformis, also known as the hairy bramble or thorny bramble, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). It is a shrub with prickly stems and white or pink flowers, native to Asia and parts of Europe. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of anthocyanins and flavonoids, which have been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. Rubus hirtiformis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which have been used to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system.
